arts.ttl: Erling Haaland may ruin Arsenal transfer plan as major twist comes to light
arts.sum: Manchester City star Erling Haaland is being targeted by Real Madrid and Sporting striker Viktor Gyokeres has been linked with a move to the Etihad to replace the Norwegian

arts.ttl: Oleksandr Zinchenko claims Pep Guardiola called him after Man City won the Treble and thanked him for his contributions at the club - despite defender playing the season at Arsenal
arts.sum: Man City made history in 2022-23 as they claimed the Premier League, FA Cup and Champions League - becoming just the second English side to win the Treble.

Chelsea lost Thiago Silva on a free transfer during the summer window and while the club are continuing to scour the globe for the best young talents in world football, they are reportedly monitoring Dias’ situation at Man City as they ponder a potential swoop in 2025. However, Dias has now emerged as a possible target and the west London giants are set to eye a move in 2025.

arts.ttl: Premier League to send clubs updated APT rule change proposals after Man City challenge
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Jamie Gardner PA Chief Sports Reporter, Bruna Reis)
arts.sum: Premier League clubs will be sent updated APT rule change proposals after the conclusion of the arbitration and the outcome of the Man City legal challenge was made public.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Zinchenko makes shock Man City allegation
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has claimed that Manchester City kept him on an academy deal until he had made 43 senior appearances for the club. "The City lawyers said: 'Look, this is an academy player contract, right?
